creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can you also provide a diff against baseline for the output of:

pkg rquery '%o %B' | grep 'libiconv\.so' | sort

Some ports appear to be linking with libiconv when it is available instead of using iconv from libc (e.g. because they don't respect CFLAGS).  The baseline doesn't have to be of the same svn revision.  I just want to get a rough idea.
